item.title: Adventures
item.description:
A personal log of selected mountain, sailing, and self-powered trips.

137 entries
Sailing Ski mountaineering / Backcountry skiing Alpinism Alpine climbing Canyoning Caving Bikepacking Hikes

Sailing

Longer trips and sea miles.

2
Peaux de foc au cercle polaire
⛵ + 🎿 March 2025

Northern Norway

Lausanne – Bodø
🚆
Bodø – Kjerringøy
⛵
Kjerringøy – Nordskot
⛵
Nordskot – Trollfjorden
⛵
Trolltinden, N couloir to approximately 700m
🎿 4.1 ★★★★★
Trollfjorden – Blokken
⛵
Fuglen 874m, Camarandine Couloir
🎿 4.1 ★★★★★
Blokken – Ersfjord
⛵
Luttinden 759m, SE couloir
🎿 4.1 ★★★★★
Luttinden 759m, S/SW couloir
🎿 3.3 ★★★★★
Fuglan 720m, NW couloir
🎿 4.1 ★★★★★
Latræva couloir
🎿 4.3 ★★★★★
Ersfjord – Mefjordbotn
⛵
The King’s Gate couloir
🎿 5.2 ★★★★★
Store Hesten 874m
🎿 F ★★★★★
Mefjordbotn – Reine
⛵
Munken 797m, first SW couloir
🎿 4.3 ★★★★★
Tippelei voyage to Norway
May-September 2023

Norway

Bought Tippelei, a 40-year-old, 36-foot sailing boat, and sailed it to Norway during a sabbatical.

Ski mountaineering / Backcountry skiing

Ski tours, couloirs, traverses, and bicycle-ski trips.

75
